description: The Zorba Series: Books 1‚Äì3 From the much-loved Zorba series. Three warm and hilarious stories of Greek village life in one volume. What happens when a few pensioners decide to save a struggling Greek island taverna? In theory it should be simple. A few tables, a small kitchen, and perhaps a glass of wine or two. In reality it involves a stubborn Englishman, his spirited Greek wife Alex, a fisherman philosopher, a formidable village cook, and an entire community that believes it has a say in how the place should be run. Before long the taverna becomes the beating heart of the village. Fishermen arrive with the day‚Äôs catch. Neighbours appear with unsolicited recipes. The old men of the kafenio offer daily advice, whether it is needed or not. And somehow, in the middle of all this cheerful chaos, friendships grow, laughter flows, and the simple magic of Greek life reveals itself. This special collection brings together all three books from the much-loved Zorba series in one delightful volume filled with colourful characters, sunlit tavernas, and the warmth of a community that welcomes everyone to the table. Pull up a chair. In Greece, the door is always open. Read more
